app.title: Library Management System
app.subtitle: Manage books and loan records easily.

books.title: Books
books.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?
books.defaultSummary: No summary has been added for this book yet.

summaries.crimeAndPunishmentSummary: The novel follows former law student Raskolnikov as he struggles with guilt, morality and inner conflict after committing a crime.
summaries.nineteenEightyFourSummary: A dystopian novel that questions freedom and truth in a totalitarian world controlled by Big Brother.
summaries.alchemistSummary: The story follows Santiago on a journey to discover his dreams, destiny and personal legend.
summaries.animalFarmSummary: An allegorical novel that criticizes totalitarian regimes through the struggle for freedom of animals living on a farm.
summaries.madonnaInAFurCoatSummary: A deeply moving story about the unforgettable relationship between Raif Efendi and Maria Puder.
summaries.lesMiserablesSummary: A classic French novel exploring justice, compassion and social inequality through the life of Jean Valjean.
summaries.chessSummary: The story of Dr. B., who uses chess to survive intense psychological pressure while held in isolation.

loans.title: Loan Operations
loans.actualReturnDateHint: Leave this field empty if the book has not been returned.
loans.plannedReturnDateRequired: The planned return date is required.
loans.plannedDateBeforeLoanDate: The planned return date cannot be earlier than the loan date.
loans.actualDateBeforeLoanDate: The actual return date cannot be earlier than the loan date.
loans.searchPlaceholder: Search by book, author or borrower...
loans.noReturnedLoans: There are no returned loan records yet.
loans.riskyBorrowerMessage: {{borrower}} has previously returned {{count}} books late. Do you still want to loan "{{book}}"?
